title: Compilation breaks with bad code: assigning to 'CData' (aka 'unsigned char') from incompatible type 'CData [3]'
body:
```
./Vtest_bench.cpp:1470:19: error: assigning to 'CData' (aka 'unsigned char') from incompatible type 'CData [3]'
        = vlTOPp->test_bench__DOT____Vcellinp__x____pinNumber3;
          ~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```

I couldn't minimize a testcase.

verilator-4.026
